deep_dive.title: Shift-Left High-Level Synthesis Verification via Knowledge-Augmented LLM Agent
deep_dive.abstract: High-Level Synthesis (HLS) relies on transforming original C specifications into synthesizable HLS-oriented C (HLS-C) implementations. Functional consistency verification between original C specifications and HLS-C implementations is a critical yet labor-intensive task in HLS design flows. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently shown promise in automated testbench generation, their stochastic nature often leads to insufficient coverage, inconsistent verification environments, and unreliable equivalence checking results. To address these limitations, we propose a knowledge-augmented, agent-driven shift-left verification framework for automated functional consistency checking between original C and HLS-C implementations before synthesis. The framework introduces a Dual-Tier Consistency Checking mechanism that jointly enforces static structural alignment and dynamic behavioral equivalence between paired testbenches, while integrating symbolic execution and coverage-driven refinement to improve verification completeness. Furthermore, we construct a heterogeneous HLS Verification Knowledge Graph to provide topology-aware reasoning priors for testbench generation, and design an autonomous verification agent to orchestrate iterative refinement and failure diagnosis across heterogeneous toolchains. Experimental results on 107 HLS benchmark pairs demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves 0.9826 average coverage and 0.9533 dynamic consistency, outperforming representative AST-based, retrieval-augmented, and iterative agent-based baselines. https://github.com/cz-5f/HLS-LeVeri.git
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Knowledge-augmented LLM agent for HLS functional consistency verification
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 知识增强的LLM代理用于HLS功能一致性验证
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 知识增强的LLM代理用于HLS功能一致性验证
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 知识增强的LLM代理用于HLS功能一致性验证
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes knowledge-augmented LLM agent for shift-left verification of HLS designs, checking functional consistency between original C and HLS-C implementations before synthesis.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对高层次综合中原始C与HLS-C实现的功能一致性验证耗时且易错的问题，提出知识增强的LLM代理驱动的左移验证框架。该框架利用LLM的代码理解和生成能力，结合领域知识，在综合前自动检查一致性，克服纯LLM测试生成覆盖不足的缺陷。实验表明能提高验证效率与可靠性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对高层次综合中原始C与HLS-C实现的功能一致性验证耗时且易错的问题，提出知识增强的LLM代理驱动的左移验证框架。该框架利用LLM的代码理解和生成能力，结合领域知识，在综合前自动检查一致性，克服纯LLM测试生成覆盖不足的缺陷。实验表明能提高验证效率与可靠性。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: large language model for hardware formal verification
